feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Download com.sap.it.api.mapping.* jar file
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use com.sap.it.api.mapping.* in IntelliJ. However it results in an error due to missing JAR. Can someone help with resources from where I can download this?

Note : I have already imported the Script API and Generic API jar from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloudintegration

Best Regards

entry.title: Sharepoint CSV-File integration in Datasphere's Data Flow leads to an error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we are currently trying to establish a connection between SAP Datasphere and a customer's SharePoint.

To do this, we followed the instructions described in the following blog entry...

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/accessing-sharepoint-files-from-datasphere-using-btp-open-connectors/ba-p/13917779

...and successfully created the Integration Suite service, along with the SharePoint connector provided by the Open Connectors.

Here is the configuration of the Open Connectors pointing to Sharepoint:

 

Unfortunately, we have not yet been able to display a file in the Datasphere.

To do this, we created a "test.csv" with a handful of data, which is located in the "Documents/Datasphere_Test" directory.

We can already see this folder structure in the Dataflow of the Datasphere:

 

But as soon as we drag and drop the "test.csv" file in, we get the following error message:

 

The error message displayed, shows that the "test.csv" cannot be found.

The Open Connectors uses the following URL call, which leads to the error:

<company>.sharepoint.com/_api/web/GetFolderByServerRelativeUrl('Freigegebene%20Dokumente/Datasphere_Test/test.csv')

 

We have already experimented a bit here and tested via the browser that the file can be found via the following URL:

<company>.sharepoint.com/_api/Web/GetFileByServerRelativePath(decodedurl='/Freigegebene%20Dokumente/Datasphere_Test/test.csv')

We assume that we still need to define something in the Open Connectors configuration?

Is there perhaps a challenge with URL coding or something similar?

We would be grateful for any relevant information here.

Additional challenge:
The above named blog entry aims to ensure that we have access to the top level of the SharePoint. In the future, however, we also want to access sites, such as the site “Datalake” that we created here:

 

Here, too, the question arises  what we need to adjust the Open Connectors (or perhaps also in Sharepoint) so that we can also consume files that exist in the 'datalake' site.

 

Our attempt to adjust the Sharepoint site address in the form

<company>.sharepoint.com/sites/datalake

led to authentication errors.

 

If we leave the Sharepoint site address untouched (<company>.sharepoint.com), we can authenticate, but we cannot see the data structures of the site “datalake”.

 

Changing the “Document Library” property to

/sites/datalake/

was also unsuccessful.

 

Does anyone here have experience of how we need to adjust our configuration(s)?

 

Many thanks in advance,

M. Spyker

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - SQL Updata via JDBC Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am trying to trigger the following SQL in an I-Flow via the JDBC Adapter

 

 

UPDATE 
    TelHdr 
SET 
    STATUS=31 
WHERE 
    SND = xyz AND 
    TELEID = 1

 

 

Unfortunately, I always get the following error: 

 

  • "org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; Zeichenfolgen- oder Binärdaten würden abgeschnitten.; nested exception is com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Zeichenfolgen- oder Binärdaten würden abgeschnitten., cause: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Zeichenfolgen- oder Binärdaten würden abgeschnitten."

 

  • Error translated into English: ‘String or binary data would be truncated.’

 

This error means that the written value is too large for the written field.

The same update query was also executed with the same user directly in MS SQL Studio where it worked without problems, which means that the update query with these values and the user with the assigned roles was also checked and should work.

 

Procedure:

Step 1. JDBC Data Source Creation:

JDBC Data Source in the Integration Suite is set up and it is also possible to read values via a select.

The JDBC driver for Microsoft SQL Server was also changed from version 8.2.2 to 8.4.1 for test purposes, which unfortunately did not change the update behaviour.

Step 2. I-Flow Creation

- Set SQL Statement in the Content Modifier Body

Info: Reading this View via a regular select also works without problems with the same procedure, only the update runs on error

JDBC Adapter with the JDBC Data Source Alias

Error Appears: 

Has anyone already had this problem or has an idea of what to check?

Many thanks in advance.

 

Best regards

Chris P.

entry.title: SAP CPI Custom Adapter Development Spring Bean Usage
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am currently working on a custom adapter for the CPI. So far everything has gone smoothly. But I've been trying to register my written classes as Spring Beans in the existing Camel Context for some time now and it just doesn't want to work. Has anyone had any experience with this and can share here how it works and whether it is possible?

entry.title: How to get the error details in SAP CPI when calling via HTTPS?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

This is what I am trying to do.

I will call HTTPS from Postman, and the integration flow itself will show failure, which is my intention.

At the point when I call from Postman, the body of message only shows "An internal server error occured: The MPL ID of the failed message is : ......." and returned 500 internal server error as error code.

However, what I expect is that after calling from Postman, the body of message can show the details of error, just like what can be observed in SAP CPI. 

Plus, I hope that I can change the error code as well. Now it is 500 but is it possible to change it?

I am aware that this should be done by some groovy script. Does anyone know how to achieve this?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: "SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed" error in BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a trial BTP account and was following https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-starter-isuite-onboard-subscribe.html tutorial to Set Up the Integration Suite Trial account.

At step 4 "Automatically assign roles and create service instances using Booster" I am getting an error:

"SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed. Please subscribe the application and activate capabilities manually to proceed."

This is strange, as I have just subscribed to the SAP Integration Suite in a previous step (attached screenshots)

Has someone been able to fix this? I have found a similar question from 2022, so this seems to be a known issue. It's discouraging that SAP has not corrected the documentation, as it makes me less confident to follow these tutorials.

Thank you!

entry.title: API Proxy 401 Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello,

After successfully creating API Proxy with API Provider (On-Prem) at the time of test API Proxy, it shows 401 Unauthorised. Please suggest how to resolve it, and I also want to know what my basic authentication username and password will be. It should be on-prem username & password or what?.

entry.title: Sample Data not working
entry.content:
When attempting to use the the Sample data for a REST API direct integration resource, getting the following when saving the record:

Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'includes')

entry.title: cTMS-Only Approach for Delivering Content to SAP Cloud Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I use the cTMS (SAP Cloud Transport Management Service) for distributing integration content from the non-production SCPI tenant to the production SCPI tenant. Is it possible to restrict the import of integration content only to the content delivered via cTMS? I want to ensure that suppliers transfer integration content only through this service and that all distributions are clearly auditable and transparent.

Thank you,

Jiri

entry.title: Append Option for SharePoint Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Is there a provision to append the existing file with new content using the standard Microsoft SharePoint Receiver adapter ?
currently I see the options for Default, Rename, Replace and Dynamic as Handling for Existing Files(also attached the screenshot below) but no option for "Append"
is there any workaround for this option ?

 

Expecting a similar functionality as we have for the standard SFTP receiver adapter with append option.

entry.title: How to write a Groovy Script For Multilable, and what is the Extension do I use if using JavaScript
entry.content:
Multilable function in Javascript.

public void multilabel(int[] var1, ResultList result, Container container) throws StreamTransformationException{
if(var1.length>0){
int b = var1[0];
for(int i=0;i<b;i++)
{
result.addValue(i+1);
}
}

entry.title: Append Option for SharePoint Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a provision to append the existing file with new content using the standard Microsoft SharePoint Receiver adapter ?
currently I see the options for Default, Rename, Replace and Dynamic as Handling for Existing Files(also attached the screenshot below) but no option for "Append"
is there any workaround for this option ?

Expecting a similar functionality as we have for the standard SFTP receiver adapter with append option.

entry.title: BTP service plan "Process Integration Runtime" and Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I need to understand a question: I need to know if it is possible to use Service Instance and Service Key for inbound authentication for i-flow of Integration suite (basic edition) by enabling "Process Integration Runtime". To enable "Process Integration Runtime", we need to enable "Cloud Foundry" in our subaccount. I would like to know if there are any costs associated with enabling "Cloud Foundry" in the subaccount. If there are, how much does it cost?

Best regards.

entry.title: Looping Condition not getting executed in Local Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an issue where the non-xml condition in the Local Integration flow is not working as expected.

I have added the RunCount = 3 in header and it can be seen in the trace logs but still the condition is not executed. The flow is executed only once, but ideally it should be executed 0,1,2(3 times as per CamelLoopIndex count).

Adding the trace screenshot for your reference below -

Please suggest what is wrong here and why is it not getting executed thrice?

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: SAP integration suite data in excel sheet
entry.content:
Hi experts

Existing approach:

     As we all know, migration from SAP Process Integration/Process Orchestration (PI/PO) to SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI). As part of this process, we have identified the need to generate Excel sheets with some dump data during the assessment phase, which include categories such as “Ready to Migrate,” “Adjustment required,” etc. 


Expecting: Similar type of info(excel sheet) generation for Integration Suite 

    Is it possible/Is there any approach on how to achieve this within the SAP Integration Suite, including any API's/other solutions or scripts that can facilitate this process. We need to generate similar Excel sheets within the SAP Integration Suite.Like Connection URL, User id, Password (Is not expected), any query string, type of connector , etc.Mapping specification if mapping is involved in iflow.We are exploring options to achieve this through API or other solutions.

Could you provide detailed instructions or examples on how to generate Excel sheets from data within the Integration Suite? Specifically, we are looking for advanced methods to automate this process and ensure seamless integration with our existing workflows.

 

Thank you....

entry.title: XML Properties to Json format
entry.content:
Hello everyone , i face the following issue:

I have properties that are in XML format :

 because the body is in xml. I want to take all the properties and make an JSON Log attachment file (errorProperties.json) that have them transformed in json format. The issue is that there are properties in XML . I tried to convert them via Groovy script , using base64->string but it doesnt work. Do you have any ideas?

entry.title: SAP API Management - OAuth 2.0 authentication with SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I need some help in understanding the SAML Assertion based OAuth authentication set up between SAP API Management (SAP APIM) and SuccessFactors (SF) system. I followed this blog post to set this up.

With an exception that I used "https://mySuccessFactorsTenant.com/oauth/token" end point to retrieve the OAuth token instead of using "https://mySuccessFactorsTenant.com/oauth/idp" end point, since this will be deprecated.

The idea is to not to expose the MyHr system directly to the open internet and to have security measures(OAuth 2.0 and TLS 1.2) in place.

The Proxy with this set up is working fine and we are able to connect to back-end SF system and do all operations. I have the following questions:

  1. How can I check the TLS version being used. I came across this post which says that TLS 1.2 is enforced by default. Is this also true for connection between the Consumer of the API Proxy and SAP APIM?
  2. Since the SAML assertion for OAuth with SF is being generated by a policy inside SAP APIM proxy here, can it be said that SAP APIM is idp here?
  3. New Requirements:
    1. SF wants to create dedicated Users for each Consumer to restrict access/authorizations - For now, I have implemented the logic to get the Username during runtime based on Application name and then use that Username to create Assertion/token so that authentication is done with User assigned for calling Consumer. Is this the correct way to achieve this? Any alternative way to do this?
    2. We are also required to use OAuth 2.0 for all requests coming to SAP APIM. I understand that one way to achieve this would be to have a service in SAP APIM which the consumer can call to get the OAuth token (Client credential based OAuth) as described here. This approach will result in 2 OAuth set-ups, one between Consumer <--> SAP APIM and another one between SAP APIM <--> SF.

Considering requirement from Point 3.1 and 3.2 above, what would be the recommended approach for the overall Integration i.e. to have OAuth 2.0 set up for end to end communication? Please advise.

Regards,

Faisal

entry.title: Externalized Parameters are not displayed in the configuration view
entry.content:
Hey Community,

I would like to create parameters that can be configured. The background is as follows. When I deploy an integration flow from the test system to the production system, I no longer want to have to make changes within the iFlow. It should be sufficient to adjust the configurable parameters.

In this test scenario, I have created the two externalized parameters "Test1" & "Test2".

My expectation would now be that I have the possibility to set appropriate values for these parameters via the "configure" action of the iFlow. However, in the configure view, for some inexplicable reason, only the last added parameter is available to me.

Does anyone have an idea why this could be? I have already tested the classics such as reloading the page or clearing the brwoser cache and these can be ruled out.

I am grateful for any advice.
Greetings Marc

entry.title: Integration Flow simulation fails
entry.content:
Hi,

Have an issue with simulation of integration flow. Have tried many times with different logics putting and deleting body/headers/properties, tried from different tenants and browsers and all the time just simple popup 

Does some one know how to fix it or it's global issue?

entry.title: SAP CPI Groovy Script Blanked Out
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing a bit of a situation - we were working on developing an integration and had deployed it last night and everything looked good.

This morning, we opened it and the Groovy Script has gone blank - it shows 0 bytes.

We tried to download from deployed and reupload from Manage Integration Content, but it still shows 0 bytes.

If anyone has any ideas on how to recover it, it would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Sarthak
